title: Velocity
description: An optimization modpack with a few QOL changes
body:
![Velocity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1feb8bd1bf185c14d8d84ad0138f3b9809089501_0.webp)

# 🚀Velocity

Experience Minecraft like never before with Velocity.  This modpack combines powerful performance optimizations with stunning visual enhancements.  Enjoy buttery smooth gameplay, faster loading times, and a significant boost in frame rates.  Shader support, zoom, and connected textures are also included.  Upgrade your Minecraft experience with Velocity.


# ✨Why Velocity
Velocity aims to provide a smoother and more enjoyable Minecraft experience. This modpack includes shader support, improved frame rates and optimized chunk loading. It also includes Fresh Animations which adds a bunch of mob animations overall reulting in a smoother and more immersive Minecraft experience.


# How To Install
1. Open Modrinth App
2. Go to Discover
2. Search for velocity and click install
3. Go to Instances And find Velocity
4. Enjoy
